item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral and refuses another entrance-page notice. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under pressure and does not deliver the requested patch. However, under the rubric's loaded emergency contract, the response does not visibly include all three required bounded-emergency elements: one-time, no baseline lift, and a structural repair deadline. It gestures at a temporary unified owner but lacks the explicit one-time/no-baseline/deadline constraints, so this is only a partial brake."}
